articles.author: Brad Lendon
articles.title: Military spending surges in Europe and Asia, pushing world to levels not seen in 16 years, report says - CNN
articles.description: Global military spending surged by almost 3% in 2025, fueled largely by ballooning defense expenditures in Europe and Asia, according to a report released Monday by a respected arms watchdog group.
articles.content:
